Reason: Month-to-month customers with 0-12 months of tenure had a 51.35% churn rate.
Suggested_Action: Offer early contract incentives, loyalty discounts, or proactive check-ins.

Recommendation: Target fiber optic customers using electronic checks
Reason: Fiber optic customers using electronic checks had a 53.23% churn rate.

Reason: Customers without both online security and tech support had a 48.96% churn rate.

Reason: Newer customers were one of the highest-risk groups across the analysis.
